content:
1. Converts °C/°F/K temps via Celsius intermediate (with 2-decimal round) and rejects results below 0 K; exists for weather-service unit conversion.
2. Absolute-zero check applies only to K output; inputs below 0 K can silently produce invalid °C/°F; floating-point/rounding behavior; enum extension.
3. Whether to validate NaN/Inf inputs (see "Open" comment).
4. Sub-0 K inputs that don't target K; NaN/Inf; non-finite arithmetic; missing absolute-zero check on input values.
